summary: Iteration 9: Comprehensive auth system testing for multi-salesperson and admin module. All 16 backend API tests passed (registration, login, token verification, admin routes, role management, data isolation). All 7 frontend UI tests passed (login page, registration validation, salesperson login, logout, admin login, admin panel, XLS import button).
passed_tests: Registration with @fshac.com email succeeds - returns token and user with salesperson role
Registration with non-@fshac.com email (e.g., @gmail.com) correctly rejected with 400 error
Registration with duplicate email correctly rejected with 400 error
Login as salesperson (benjamin@fshac.com/test123) succeeds - returns token and user info
Login as admin (admin@fshac.com/admin123) succeeds - returns token with admin role
Login with invalid credentials returns 401
Login with non-existent user returns 401
/api/auth/me returns user info when authenticated
/api/auth/me returns 401 without token
Admin can access /api/admin/salespeople - returns all users without password_hash
Salesperson cannot access /api/admin/salespeople - returns 403
Admin /api/admin/comparison returns comparison stats with totals
Salesperson leads endpoint returns only their assigned leads (Benjamin has 53)
Admin leads endpoint returns all leads
Salesperson KPIs are filtered to their data
XLS import endpoint requires authentication
UI: Login page loads with Sign In and Register tabs
UI: Non-fshac.com email shows error toast 'Only @fshac.com emails are allowed'
UI: Salesperson dashboard shows user name, NO Admin tab visible
UI: Logout button works - returns to login page
UI: Admin dashboard shows user name and Admin tab visible
UI: Admin panel shows Global Overview, Charts, Salesperson Comparison, User Management
UI: Data tab shows 'Import XLS' button
UI: Admin can filter dashboard by clicking salesperson name - shows 'Viewing: [name]' banner
seed_data_creation: Test users created during registration tests (prefixed with test_ or dup_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 verified the new auth system (JWT with roles). Test accounts: admin@fshac.com/admin123 (admin role), benjamin@fshac.com/test123 (salesperson role). Benjamin has 53 leads assigned. Admin can filter dashboard by salesperson. Registration requires @fshac.com email domain. All previous features (follow-ups, email/SMS actions, KPIs) remain working.

features_verified.data_isolation: Working - salespeople see only their leads
features_verified.logout: Working - clears token and returns to login
